exports.name: initFirebase
exports.signature: (config: object) -> Promise<void>; idempotent; called once at boot

exports.name: signInAnonymously
exports.signature: () -> Promise<{uid: string}>; called at boot, blocks until UID is available

invariants: Section-6's boot sequence awaits initFirebase, then awaits signInAnonymously, then mounts the router. The router never mounts before a UID is available.
